2603.24579.title: MARCH: Multi-Agent Reinforced Self-Check for LLM Hallucination
2603.24579.paper_summary: Hallucination remains a critical bottleneck for large language models (LLMs), undermining their reliability in real-world applications, especially in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. While existing hallucination detection methods employ LLM-as-a-judge to verify LLM outputs against retrieved evidence, they suffer from inherent confirmation bias, where the verifier inadvertently reproduces the errors of the original generation. To address this, we introduce Multi-Agent Reinforced Self-Check for Hallucination (MARCH), a framework that enforces rigorous factual alignment by leveraging deliberate information asymmetry. MARCH orchestrates a collaborative pipeline of three specialized agents: a Solver, a Proposer, and a Checker. The Solver generates an initial RAG response, which the Proposer decomposes into claim-level verifiable atomic propositions. Crucially, the Checker validates these propositions against retrieved evidence in isolation, deprived of the Solver's original output. This well-crafted information asymmetry scheme breaks the cycle of self-confirmation bias. By training this pipeline with multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), we enable the agents to co-evolve and optimize factual adherence. Extensive experiments across hallucination benchmarks demonstrate that MARCH substantially reduces hallucination rates. Notably, an 8B-parameter LLM equipped with MARCH achieves performance competitive with powerful closed-source models. MARCH paves a scalable path for factual self-improvement of LLMs through co-evolution. The code is at https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/MARCH.
2603.24579.paper_summary_zh: 幻覺仍然是大型語言模型（LLMs）的一個關鍵瓶頸，削弱了它們在現實世界應用中的可靠性，特別是在檢索增強生成（RAG）系統中。雖然現有的幻覺檢測方法使用 LLM 作為判斷者來驗證 LLM 輸出與檢索證據的一致性，但它們受到固有的確認偏誤的影響，驗證者不經意地重現了原始生成的錯誤。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了多代理強化自檢查幻覺（MARCH），這是一個通過利用故意的信息不對稱來強化嚴格事實對齊的框架。MARCH 組織了一個由三個專門代理組成的協作管道：解決者、提議者和檢查者。解決者生成初始的 RAG 回應，提議者將其分解為可驗證的原子命題。關鍵是，檢查者在孤立的情況下驗證這些命題，沒有使用解決者的原始輸出。這個精心設計的信息不對稱方案打破了自我確認偏誤的循環。通過使用多代理強化學習（MARL）訓練這個管道，我們使代理能夠共同進化並優化事實遵循。針對幻覺基準的廣泛實驗表明，MARCH 顯著降低了幻覺率。值得注意的是，配備 MARCH 的 8B 參數 LLM 在性能上與強大的閉源模型具有競爭力。MARCH 為 LLM 的事實自我改進鋪平了一條可擴展的道路，通過共同進化。代碼位於 https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/MARCH。
2603.24579.author: Zhuo Li et.al.
2603.24579.authors: Zhuo Li, Yupeng Zhang, Pengyu Cheng, Jiajun Song, Mengyu Zhou, Hao Li, Shujie Hu, Yu Qin, Erchao Zhao, Xiaoxi Jiang, Guanjun Jiang
